Eugène Delacroix

by Eugène Delacroix
France, 19th century · not dated · oil on fabric

by Eugène Delacroix

Liberty Leading the People
by Eugène Delacroix
French Romanticism · 1830 · Louvre, Paris
Painted after the July Revolution that overthrew Charles X. Liberty strides over the barricades, bare-breasted, bayonet and tricolor raised. The boy with pistols later became Hugo's Gavroche.
A Young Black Woman Fetching Water
by Eugène Delacroix
France · 1832 · Watercolor and graphite, heightened with gouache on paper

by Eugène Delacroix
France, 19th century · 1832 · watercolor over graphite

France, 19th century · 1833 · aquatint
